title: Suia le upu faataga
subtitle: Fa'afou lau puipuiga fa'amatalaga
currentPassword: upu tuanai o le taimi nei
currentPasswordPlaceholder: Ulufale upu faataga o iai nei
requirements: E tatau ona iai le 8+ mata'itusi, mata'itusi tetele, mataitusi la'ititi, numera, & tusi fa'apitoa

messages.error: Ua tupu se mea sese. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.
messages.failed: Ua le mafai ona faafou upu faataga
messages.mismatch: E le fetaui upu faataga fou
messages.invalid: E tatau ona iai le upu fa'aigoa ia le itiiti ifo i le 8 mataitusi, tasi le mataitusi tetele, tasi le mataitusi laiti, tasi le numera ma le tasi le mataitusi faapitoa
